tasks.title: T0 keystone: thread the confidence scalar into actuate.Request + persist confidence/min_confidence on the decision/triage record (G1)

scenarios: The confidence scalar persists and reads back non-zero

tasks.title: T0: widen the policy_decision writer to persist bundle_version + matched_rules[] + reason (G2)

scenarios: A policy_decision row carries the in-force bundle_version and the matched-rules list

tasks.title: T0: finish T-015-13 — thread action_id/external_ref/principal into the policy Decide audit (G3)

scenarios: The policy Decide audit carries the action_id external_ref and principal keys

tasks.title: T0: backfill action_manifest.approval_choice + action_manifest.verdict on the lifecycle writer (G4)

scenarios: The action_manifest backfills the approval choice and the post-execution verdict

tasks.title: T0: reach external_ref onto the actuation/verify side so the ingest->verify walk needs no bridge (G3 correlation fix, owner-decision 3)

scenarios: The ingest to verify walk joins end to end with no bridge hop

tasks.title: T1: versioned/immutable ruleset record so a past decision joins the exact ACL doc in force (G2 dep, owner-decision 4)

scenarios: A past decision joins the exact immutable ruleset version in force when it decided

tasks.title: T1: per-interceptor-gate verdict trail — ordered rows per gate, both keys, append-only REVOKE, observe-only emit (G5)

scenarios: All gates of a passing action leave ordered verdict rows
A refusing action leaves the refusing gate row and no phantom pass rows past it
Every decision chokepoint emits an observe-only trace step at its boundary
The runtime role holds no update or delete on the agent-step and gate-verdict evidence tables

tasks.title: T1: per-cycle agent-loop transcript (agent_step) — Scrub before persist, non-secret, append-only, keyed by external_ref (G6)

scenarios: Each ReAct cycle leaves a scrubbed agent-step record with no secret value
The detail endpoint projects references and schemes only and never a secret value

tasks.title: T1: persist prompt_version + seed_hash + model_tier on the session/triage record (G7)

scenarios: The session record carries the seed hash prompt version and model tier

tasks.title: T2: per-session detail READ endpoint GET /v1/sessions/{external_ref} — authenticated non-secret assembler, ordered steps, observe-only (G8)

scenarios: The trace record carries every decision-grade field for a step
The detail endpoint returns the ordered steps of one session over an authenticated read

tasks.note: Coarse-first read model over the durable spine (classify/propose/predict/verify). REQ-2002 (on/off decision-path proof) binds when the REQ-2001 emit side lands; REQ-2010 (queued/running coverage) binds when the T-020-13 step channel lands.

tasks.title: T2: distinct elevated trace-read RBAC role gating the trace surface (owner-decision 2)

scenarios: The trace surface is gated behind a distinct trace-read role

tasks.title: T2: live-wire the console Workflows view to the detail endpoint, retain fixture as render contract, respect assemble.py byte-repro (G9)

scenarios: The console workflows view renders real trace steps in place of the fixtures

tasks.note: Live decision-tracer inspector in the Workflows view: /v1/sessions index + on-select GET /v1/sessions/{external_ref} renders the real classify->propose->predict->verify walk; WF_RUNS fixtures retained as the offline render contract (rendered labeled DEMO only when the spine serves nothing). REQ-2012 console-render half has no Go-drivable oracle (JS surface); its byte-repro half is guarded by make console-verify + verified e2e on-box.

tasks.title: T2: per-session step SSE channel so queued/live-running sessions animate from real boundary events (G10)

scenarios: A queued or running session animates from real boundary events over the step channel

tasks.title: T3 (optional, owner-gated): OTel span backbone + off-by-default Langfuse-OSS exporter of the redacted LLM subset + two-layer schema separation (G12)

scenarios: The optional export lane carries the redacted LLM subset only and is off by default
The trace schema separates the estate-specific layer from the generalizable layer

tasks.title: T2: confidence calibrator — reliability curve + Brier/ECE from persisted confidence x verified outcome (read-only, observe-only; the gate stays OFF until calibrated)

scenarios: The calibrator bins stated confidence against verified outcomes into a reliability curve

tasks.note: Calibrator = pure core/calibrate.Compute (merged !436) + core/db.CalibrationReadStore (session_triage.confidence ⋈ infragraph_prediction verified-clean by external_ref) + temporal/calibrate.Job (read-only pass) wired as a cmd/worker ticker (TG_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL). Observe-only: adjudicates/gates nothing; min_confidence clamp stays OFF until calibrated. Honestly reports 'no evidence yet' until fresh sessions carry confidence + external_ref.
